rationale: Hard pass. The archetype is a licensed Dragon Ball IP moment (Goku SSJ3 Dragon Fist) — using it is a legal non-starter for Roof Rails, and even stripped of IP, the dark gold/indigo anime palette and combat power-fantasy beat have zero connection to a bright pastel rooftop runner with pole-balancing and saw obstacles. Audience also skews shonen-anime male teen rather than the broad all-ages casual base, and there's no mechanic bridge to running/sliding/collecting. Do not adapt.
